inbound_message.subject: Quick Quote Needed
inbound_message.body:
Hi,

Could you quote on:

- 300x M6 Hex Bolt, Zinc Plated, Grade 4.6
- Some M6 Hex Nuts (not sure on quantity yet)

No delivery date confirmed - will advise.

Chris
